editableInputs.label: Image
editableInputs.description: Choose the image file that will be used as input for this part of the workflow.

editableInputs.label: Target Width
editableInputs.description: Sets the width the image should be resized to before generation continues.

editableInputs.label: Target Height
editableInputs.description: Sets the height the image should be resized to before generation continues.

editableInputs.label: Padding Color
editableInputs.description: Chooses the color used to fill any empty space added around the resized image.

editableInputs.label: Model
editableInputs.description: Selects the main AI image model used to generate the final result.

editableInputs.label: IPAdapter Model Preset
editableInputs.description: Chooses the identity-retention preset that determines how the reference face or reference image is interpreted.

editableInputs.label: Text
editableInputs.description: Provides the written description that tells the AI what to create or what to avoid.

editableInputs.label: Quality of Generation
editableInputs.description: Controls how much effort the AI spends refining the image. Higher values usually improve detail but take longer.

editableInputs.label: Strength of Adherence to Textual Prompt
editableInputs.description: Controls how strongly the image follows the written prompt instead of taking creative liberties.

editableInputs.label: Generation Method
editableInputs.description: Chooses the underlying method used to generate the image. Different methods can produce different looks.

editableInputs.label: Image Refinement Style
editableInputs.description: Controls how the image is refined over the generation process.

editableInputs.label: Image Creativity
editableInputs.description: Controls how freely the AI can change the starting image. Higher values usually allow more change and creativity.

editableInputs.label: Generation Variation (seed)
editableInputs.description: A number that influences which version of the image is created. Using the same settings and the same seed usually gives a very similar result.

editableInputs.label: Strength of General Identity Retention
editableInputs.description: Controls how strongly the generated face should generally resemble the reference identity.

editableInputs.label: Strength of Face Feature Retention
editableInputs.description: Controls how strongly detailed facial features from the reference face are preserved.

editableInputs.label: Filename Prefix
editableInputs.description: Sets the beginning of the saved file name so outputs are easier to identify.
